title: Surgeon Vacancy at Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Surgeon with drive and ambition, Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions:
Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
